content: - I **build teams**, helping foster creativity and productivity within that team    - **Organized and detail-oriented**, formulating plans and executing on them with an uncompromising eye for detail    - I'm a **problem-solver**, seeing the forest and the trees, and know when it's time to look at one or the other - or both    - I practice **active listening**, ensuring anyone whom I work with never feels like I'm there waiting for my turn to speak    - I **consider my biases** and ensure I'm always **critically thinking** about the problems at hand and what I bring to the table    - I provide **mentorship with my technical leadership**, always working towards building up the people whom are junior to me by **teaching** and **delegating**    - I help **mediate** and provide **conflict resolution** when the moment comes and ensure all parties have had their voices heard
